title: [SCFToCalyx] Incorrect assert in `setResultRegs` crashes on `scf::IfOp` with multiple results
body:
`ComponentLoweringStateInterface::setResultRegs` for `scf::IfOp` asserts `idx < op->getNumOperands()`, but `idx` is a result index passed from `ifOpRes.getResultNumber()`. Since `scf::IfOp` has exactly one operand (the `i1` condition), this assert fires for any `scf::IfOp` that returns two or more values.

Any input that produces an `scf::IfOp` with 2+ results going through `SCFToCalyx` will trigger:

```
Assertion failed: idx < op->getNumOperands()
```

For example:

```mlir
%x, %y = scf.if %cond -> (i32, i32) {
  scf.yield %a, %b : i32, i32
} else {
  scf.yield %c, %d : i32, i32
}
```

PR: #9721
